question: Who are our top 10 customers by total spend?
sql:
SELECT
  u.id AS user_id,
  CONCAT(u.first_name, ' ', u.last_name) AS customer_name,
  ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS total_spend,
  COUNT(DISTINCT oi.order_id) AS orders
FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` AS oi
JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.users` AS u
  ON oi.user_id = u.id
GROUP BY user_id, customer_name
ORDER BY total_spend DESC
LIMIT 10
report: The 10 highest-spending customers each contributed roughly $1,455 to $1,803 in lifetime sales. James Brown leads at $1,803.46 across 3 orders, followed by George Mitchell ($1,722.42) and Justin Miller ($1,694.18). Most top spenders placed 3-4 orders, so their high lifetime value is driven by repeat purchasing rather than single large baskets - a sign that retention investment pays off with this segment.
